Work Showcase

Multi-device experiences.

From mobile to desktop, we design and develop seamless 3D product experiences that scale across every touchpoint. Precision engineering meets visual excellence.

Desktop First

Immersive 3D dashboards and web applications optimized for performance at 8K resolution.

Mobile Native

Touch-optimized 3D interfaces that feel natural and responsive on every mobile device.

Tablet Ready

Adaptive layouts with gesture-driven 3D interactions for the perfect in-between experience.

Brand Identity

Ceramic precision.
Neon energy.

Our visual language balances the tactile warmth of ceramic textures with the electric pulse of neon #00D4FF. This duality defines everything we create.

Material Honesty

Every surface tells a story. We use 3D materials that feel real, grounded, and premium.

Electric Accents

Strategic use of #00D4FF creates moments of focus, energy, and forward momentum.

Generous Space

White space isn’t empty. It’s where clarity lives and premium brands breathe.

About Harsh Labs

We craft the future.

Harsh Labs is a design and technology studio specializing in 3D product visualization, AI-driven experiences, and premium digital interfaces. We partner with ambitious teams to turn complex ideas into clean, intuitive, and unforgettable products.
